title: Jason Kenney UCP leadership review result
notes: Kenney resigns as UCP leader after 51.4% leadership review result (17,638 yes / 16,660 no / 34,298 ballots). 'While 51 per cent passes the constitutional threshold, it clearly is not adequate support.' Asked party to schedule leadership election ASAP. UCP caucus meets May 18. Smith issued statement same evening hinting at leadership bid. Correct primary source for EVT-056.
